claims.statement: Seikan Tunnel length is smaller than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: Shanghai Maglev top speed is faster than Category 5 hurricane threshold.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Shanghai Maglev top speed: 431 km/h. Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h.

claims.statement: Seikan Tunnel length is shorter than Suez Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km. Suez Canal length: 193 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer bits in a byte than squares on a chessboard.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 8 bits vs 64 squares.

claims.statement: Penicillin discovered happened before Telephone patented.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Penicillin discovered: 1928. Telephone patented: 1876.
